name: Herald of Topheth
text:
Demon with 5 life. 3 strength, 1 bleed, flight [FLIGHT]. Infernal.
Herald of Topheth can play cards requiring basic Daimoinon [dai], basic Potence [pot] and/or basic Presence [pre] as a vampire with capacity 5. It can enter combat with a minion as a Ⓓ action. If it has 4 or fewer life during your unlock phase, it gains 1 life.
